title: Flaky Australian Almond Paste Crumble
description: This herbal crumble is a crowd-pleaser featuring almond paste and blanched almonds in an easy-to-make recipe that's perfect for breakfast or dessert.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, melted butter, baking powder, and salt.
Gradually add water while stirring until dough comes together. Knead gently for about 2 minutes.
Roll out the dough on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Arrange blanched almonds evenly over the dough.
Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters or any sharp-edged tool, and place crumbles onto an ungreased baking sheet.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm with a dollop of whipped cream if desired.
